transcript: Speaker A: நீங்க இத ஆரம்பிச்சு எத்தனை நாள் ஆச்சு? [How many days has it been since you started this?] Speaker B: ஒரு பத்து முதல் பன்னிரண்டு நாள் இருக்கும். [It would be about 10 to 12 days.] Speaker A: அப்போ இப்போ ஏதாச்சும் மாற்றம் தெரியுதா? [So, do you see any change now?] Speaker B: ஆமா, I speak English very confidently now. [Yes, I speak English very confidently now.] Speaker A: ஓஹோ, இப்போ சூப்பரா இங்கிலீஷ் பேசுறீங்களே! [Oho, you speak English so well now!] Speaker C: MySivi மூலமா ஒரு கோடிக்கும் மேலானவங்க ஒருத்தரோடு ஒருத்தர் பேசி spoken English practice பண்றாங்க. நீங்களும் இன்னைக்கே ஆரம்பிங்க. ட்ரையல் வெறும் ஒரு ரூபாய்க்கு மட்டும்தான். [Through MySivi, more than 1 crore people talk to each other and practice spoken English. You too start today. Trial is for just one rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Rani, Akash. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. Mute, Speaker, End. MySivi. Start English Learning -MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. Install. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access.
summary: The ad demonstrates a peer-to-peer English practice call on the MySivi app, showing a user's confidence boost in 10 days. It leverages social proof of over 10 million downloads and promotes a premium trial offer for just ₹1.
